f : ι → E
hf : @IsCadlag ι E inst✝³ inst✝² PseudoMetricSpace.toUniformSpace.toTopologicalSpace f
s : Set ι
hs : IsCompact s
⊢ Bornology.IsBounded (f '' s)

have h₁ : ContinuousOn f s := by
    apply ContinuousOn.of_nhds_within
    intro x hx
    have h₂ : Tendsto f (𝓝[≤] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
      apply hf.right_continuous x
      exact continuousWithinAt_iff.mpr (by
        intro t ht
        have h₃ : Tendsto f (𝓝[<] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
          obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf.left_limit x
          have h₄ : Tendsto f (𝓝[≤] x) (𝓝 l) := by
            apply tendsto_nhdsWithin_of_tendsto_nhdsWithin_le
            · exact le_rfl
            · exact hl
          have h₅ : l = f x := by
            apply eq_of_tendsto_of_tendsto_nhds
            · exact h₄
            · exact hf.right_continuous x
          rw [h₅] at h₄
          exact h₄
        exact ht)
    exact h₂
  exact hs.image_of_continuousOn h₁ |>.isBounded

have h₁ : ContinuousOn f s := by
    apply ContinuousOn.of_nhdsWithin
    intro x hx
    have h₂ : Tendsto f (𝓝[Set.Ioi x] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := hf.right_continuous x

      apply le_antisymm
      · apply Filter.Tendsto.congr' (Filter.eventually_eq_iff_exists_mem.mpr ⟨Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x, by simp [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Ioi, Set.mem_Iio], by simp⟩)

      · apply Filter.Tendsto.congr' (Filter.eventually_eq_iff_exists_mem.mpr ⟨Set.Ioi x ∪ Set.Iio x, by simp [Set.mem_union, Set.mem_Ioi, Set.mem_Iio], by simp⟩)
        exact h₃.mono_left (by simp [Set.Ioi_subset_Ici, Set.Iio_subset_Iic])
    exact h₄.mono_left (by simp)
  exact hs.image_of_continuousOn h₁ |>.isBounded

have h₁ : ContinuousOn f s := by
    refine' hs.continuousOn_iff.mpr fun x hx => _
    rcases hf.left_limit x with ⟨l, hl⟩
    have hr : ContinuousWithinAt f (Set.Ioi x) x := hf.right_continuous x
    have h₂ : Tendsto f (𝓝[≤] x) (𝓝 (f x)) := by
      apply le_nhds_of_Ici_Ioi

    exact h₂.mono_left (Set.mem_nhdsWithin_Ici.mpr ⟨x, hx, le_rfl⟩)
